summary: Verified beneficiary subscription routing fix. The sidebar and mobile nav now route beneficiaries to /beneficiary/subscription (not /subscription). The SubscriptionPage is portal-aware: shows 'Your Plan' heading with beneficiary context on /beneficiary/subscription route, and 'Subscription' heading with all tiers on /subscription route.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.js (Line 284): beneficiaryNavSections ACCOUNT section correctly has '/beneficiary/subscription' link - FIX VERIFIED
MobileNav.js (Lines 337): getAccountItems() for beneficiary users correctly returns '/beneficiary/subscription' link - FIX VERIFIED
App.js (Line 278): Route '/beneficiary/subscription' exists inside beneficiary ProtectedRoute group - FIX VERIFIED
SubscriptionPage.js: isInBeneficiaryPortal correctly checks window.location.pathname.startsWith('/beneficiary') - FIX VERIFIED
SubscriptionPage.js: Heading shows 'Your Plan' on beneficiary portal, 'Subscription' on benefactor portal - FIX VERIFIED
SubscriptionPage.js: FamilyPlanSettings and SubscriptionPaywall correctly hidden on beneficiary portal - FIX VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beneficiary subscription routing is now fixed. Beneficiary users clicking 'Subscription' in sidebar/mobile nav are routed to /beneficiary/subscription (not /subscription). The SubscriptionPage shows different heading based on portal context: 'Your Plan' for beneficiary portal with locked tier info, 'Subscription' with all tiers for benefactor portal.

verified_features.benefactor_sidebar_subscription_link: PASS - Sidebar has /subscription link for benefactors
verified_features.benefactor_subscription_route: PASS - /subscription shows 'Subscription' heading with all benefactor plans
verified_features.benefactor_subscription_subtitle: PASS - Shows 'Manage your plan, billing, and family sharing'
verified_features.beneficiary_mobile_nav_subscription_link: PASS - Code verified: getAccountItems() returns '/beneficiary/subscription' for beneficiaries (Line 337)
verified_features.beneficiary_subscription_route: PASS - /beneficiary/subscription accessible and shows 'Your Plan' heading
verified_features.beneficiary_subscription_subtitle: PASS - Shows 'Your tier is determined by your benefactor's plan'
verified_features.beneficiary_portal_hides_family_settings: PASS - FamilyPlanSettings hidden on beneficiary portal
verified_features.beneficiary_portal_hides_paywall: PASS - SubscriptionPaywall hidden on beneficiary portal
verified_features.beneficiary_shows_locked_tier_message: PASS - Shows 'Your Plan Is Determined by Your Benefactor' message
verified_features.backend_plans_endpoint: PASS - Returns both plans (8) and beneficiary_plans (8)

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS OTP: MOCKED - OTP globally disabled via platform_settings.otp_disabled=true
